title: cephaelis nimbana
intro: Cephaelis nimbana, also known as the Mayan snuff or Mayan tea plant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. Traditionally used in folk medicine, Cephaelis nimbana has been reported to have antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties, making it a potential remedy for various health issues. The plant is believed to offer several health benefits, including reducing fever, treating respiratory infections, and alleviating pain, as well as possessing neuroprotective and anti-inflammatory effects. Cephaelis nimbana can be prepared as a tea, powder, or snuff, and is often used in traditional herbal remedies and medicine.
